channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年6月20日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Project Valhalla, Explained: How a Decade of Work Arrives in JDK 28 #2 DuckDB Internals: Why Is DuckDB Fast? (Part 1) #3 The Productivity J-Curve [pdf] (2018) #4 Zen and the Art of Machine Learning Research #5 Ten years of ClickHouse in open source #6 To study how chips work, MIT researchers built their own operating system #7 I found 10k GitHub repositories distributing Trojan malware #8 Gribouille 0.3.0: A Grammar of Graphics for Typst #9 The AirPods Effect #10 Show HN: Modeloop – From visual algorithms to microcontroller C code

item.title: 2026年6月20日（07:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Norway imposes near ban on AI in elementary school #2 There are no instances in ATProto #3 Hyundai buys Boston Dynamics #4 I used sound waves to make espresso. It could cut coffee‑brewing energy use by ¾ #5 Bobby Prince, composer for Doom, Wolfenstein 3D, and Duke Nukem 3D, has died #6 Surprising Economics of Load-Balanced Systems #7 How many of the 170k English words do you know? #8 Project Valhalla, Explained: How a Decade of Work Arrives in JDK 28 #9 Think of the Children: How to Force Real ID for All Internet Traffic (2023) #10 Ask HN: Will programmers write more efficient code during the memory shortage?

That'll be $5
